race.comment: FOREVER A DIAMOND (12) raced mostly in town last preparation and resumed improved beaten a nose over 1100m at Murray Bridge on speed. Had support at The Parks following but didn't manage the awkward barrier. Presents fitter again and with better luck can take it out. MINYA MURRA (14) had her second start and was sharply better beaten 0.9L over 1950m at Balaklava. The gate is a little sticky today but she won't have to improve much to fight out the finish. ROADKING (5) jumped a 3F at Balaklava on debut but raced greenly throughout (vet cleared). He's obviously been showing plenty, and will have taken fitness and learning. LADY BIV (13) has ability but on what we saw first-up,he's likely to benefit from this outing as well. Rates the best of the rest.
